title: PackBuild
description: Compiler input specification for a single pack component. Declares the category (helm, kustomize, raw) and the category-specific source fields needed to compile a ClusterPack OCI artifact. Read by the Compiler at compile time; never applied to a cluster as a CR. conductor-schema.md §7.

componentName.description: Logical name of the pack component (e.g., nginx-ingress). Used as the base name for the ClusterPack CR and all derived CRs.

category.description: Pack source category. Determines which category-specific fields are required and which are prohibited. helm: renders a Helm chart into manifests. kustomize: applies a Kustomize overlay. raw: uses pre-computed manifests and digests. Decision B (T-05).

helmSource.description: Helm chart source. Required when category=helm. Must be absent when category is kustomize or raw.

version.description: Semantic version of the chart to fetch and render.

values.description: Helm values to pass during chart rendering. Keys and values are chart-specific.

helmVersion.description: Version of the Helm SDK used to render this chart. Records the helm.sh/helm/v3 module version embedded in the Compiler binary at build time. Required when category=helm. Ensures rendering reproducibility across SDK versions. Decision B.

kustomizeSource.description: Kustomize source. Required when category=kustomize. Must be absent when category is helm or raw.

kustomizePath.description: Path to the kustomization.yaml file relative to the pack repository root.

rawSource.description: Raw manifest source. Required when category=raw. Must be absent when category is helm or kustomize. Pre-computed digests must be supplied; no rendering is performed.

rbacDigest.description: Pre-computed OCI digest of the RBAC layer OCI artifact. Required for raw category packs.

workloadDigest.description: Pre-computed OCI digest of the workload layer OCI artifact. Required for raw category packs.

targetClusters.description: List of cluster names to which the compiled ClusterPack should be delivered.

x-kubernetes-validations.message: helmSource is required when category is helm
helmSource.helmVersion is required when category is helm
kustomizeSource is required when category is kustomize
rawSource is required when category is raw
helmSource must be absent when category is not helm
kustomizeSource must be absent when category is not kustomize
rawSource must be absent when category is not raw
